name: oh-my-brain
description: The second brain that follows you across every agent. Importance-aware memory for Claude Code, Codex, and MCP-compatible tools. (Formerly squeeze-claw.)

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts --format esm --dts && tsup cli/brain.ts cli/compress.ts cli/compress-core.ts cli/codex-sync.ts cli/codex-session.ts cli/audit.ts cli/candidates.ts cli/candidates-cli.ts cli/lockfile.ts cli/mcp-server.ts --format esm --no-dts --out-dir dist/cli
scripts.build:cli: tsup cli/brain.ts cli/compress.ts cli/compress-core.ts cli/codex-sync.ts cli/codex-session.ts cli/audit.ts cli/candidates.ts cli/candidates-cli.ts cli/lockfile.ts cli/mcp-server.ts --format esm --no-dts --out-dir dist/cli
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run test:run && npm run build && npm pack --dry-run
